page_metadata.biotools__summary:
This packages enables users to build interactive widgets.  Although the underlying implementation of any widget built is through the R tcltk package, users of widgetTools do not need to know all of the lowlevel
Tcl/Tk commands, because the widget functionality is encapsulated in S4 classes which interact directly with standard R objects.
